items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #4' requires deterministic validation of the scenario behavior related to 'Staff data minimization in public views'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or validations related to this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the expected result was achieved. The lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this exploratory step.
